name: gos-whatsapp-bridge
description: Baileys-backed WhatsApp bridge for GOS. One Railway service per WhatsApp number (gos-whatsapp-main / gos-whatsapp-office) — same code, same Postgres, account selected by WHATSAPP_ACCOUNT_ID env. Slice 1: auth store + connection lifecycle + admin status/recovery. Ingestion/send come in later slices.
